tldr: Replace Prove's phone-driven US KYC with Veriff's document + selfie verification platform that has public entry pricing and broader geographic coverage.
why_switch: Document and biometric coverage across many countries, not US-centric
Public entry-tier pricing instead of contact-sales only
Trial available to validate flows before commitment
Solid SDKs for web, iOS and Android
Less dependence on US carrier data and phone possession
what_to_export: Identity attributes you persist (name, DOB, address, document refs)
export_method: Open an export request with Prove account management and capture webhook-derived records into your own datastore in parallel. Treat your internal database as the source of truth during cutover. Consult Prove's official documentation for the current export procedure.
import_method: Integrate Veriff's hosted flow or in-context SDK on your sign-up screens, route new users to Veriff while leaving Prove for already-verified users until re-verification is required, and persist webhook outcomes against your existing user IDs. Consult Veriff's official docs for current endpoint paths and SDK versions.

concept_mapping.note: Different naming, similar lifecycle: created → completed → decision
Source of truth becomes the document, not the phone
Possession proof shifts to device + face
Pick tier based on monthly verification volume

gotchas: Phone-based anti-fraud signals are not directly reproducible in Veriff
Drop-off rates depend heavily on SDK placement — instrument funnel before and after
Confirm regional data residency matches compliance requirements
Webhook signing and replay protection differ — rewrite handlers carefully
Subscription tiers can throttle features; validate the right plan for your volume
Existing Prove records must remain accessible per regulatory retention rules

email.subject: Notice of non-renewal — Prove
email.body:
Hello Prove team,

We are moving our identity verification to a different provider and will not be renewing our current contract.

Please share the effective end date, the process to export our verification records and logs, and the timeline for data deletion post-termination.

Thanks for the partnership.

Best regards,
